sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الْبَرْمَجَةُ لُغَةَ الْعَصْرِ الْحَدِيثِ، حَيْثُ تَفْتَحُ آفَاقًا وَاسِعَةً لِلْإِبْدَاعِ وَالِابْتِكَارِ.
sentences.translation: Programiranje se smatra jezikom modernog doba, jer otvara široke vidike za kreativnost i inovacije.
sentences.translationEn: Programming is considered the language of the modern era, as it opens wide horizons for creativity and innovation.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَتِ الْعَدِيدُ مِنَ الدُّوَلِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ فِي دَمْجِ تَعْلِيمِ التَّشْفِيرِ فِي الْمَنَاهِجِ الدِّرَاسِيَّةِ لِإِعْدَادِ جِيلٍ مُنَافِسٍ.
sentences.translation: Mnoge arapske zemlje počele su integrisati učenje kodiranja u školske programe kako bi pripremile konkurentnu generaciju.
sentences.translationEn: Many Arab countries have begun integrating coding education into school curricula to prepare a competitive generation.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ تَعَلُّمُ التَّفْكِيرِ الْمَنْطِقِيِّ عَبْرَ الْكَوُدِ الطُّلَّابَ عَلَى حَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الْمُعَقَّدَةِ بِكِفَاءَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Učenje logičkog razmišljanja kroz kod pomaže učenicima da efikasno rješavaju složene probleme.
sentences.translationEn: Learning logical thinking through code helps students solve complex problems efficiently.

sentences.arabic: هُنَاكَ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ الْمَنَصَّاتِ الْمَجَّانِيَّةِ الَّتِي تُوَفِّرُ مُحْتَوًى تَعْلِيمِيًّا عَالِيَ الْجَوْدَةِ بِاللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Postoji mnogo besplatnih platformi koje pružaju visokokvalitetan obrazovni sadržaj na arapskom jeziku.
sentences.translationEn: There are many free platforms that provide high-quality educational content in Arabic.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاسْتِثْمَارَ فِي الْمَهَارَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ لِلشَّبَابِ هُوَ الْمُحَرِّكُ الْحَقِيقِيُّ لِلنُّمُوِّ الِاقْتِصَادِيِّ فِي الْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Investiranje u digitalne vještine mladih pravi je pokretač ekonomskog rasta u regionu.
sentences.translationEn: Investing in the digital skills of the youth is the real driver of economic growth in the region.
